meta.question: Which organization has the model with the earliest creation date?
meta.finalAnswer:
The organization with the model having the earliest creation date is **Org52**.

- **Organization**: Org52 (https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/organization/Org52)
- **Earliest creation date**: **2015-11-20T11:09:01**
- **Model**: “Aufgabe 1: 4 Augen-Prüfung” (https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/model/sid_2258986a_c790_4708_ae4e_8dc02b7d122d)
